description: Protocol defining how agents report usage, performance, and execution metadata to the AgentBase telemetry endpoint.
goals: Enable agents to report task and workflow execution events.
Provide a consistent query-parameter format for telemetry pings.
Support analytics without requiring a backend service.
Allow systems to derive usage, performance, and reliability metrics from static hosting logs.

telemetry_endpoint.notes: The endpoint accepts any file type; only query parameters matter.

task.description: The task or workflow ID being executed.

metadata.description: Arbitrary URL-encoded metadata for debugging or analytics.

notes: All analytics are derived from static hosting logs.

usage_notes: Tasks may include telemetry_url in their metadata.
Workflows may send telemetry per step.
Evaluators may send telemetry for scoring events.
